'''9-A9''', also known as '''Nynie''', was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] owned by the nobles of [[Eiattu 6]]. It looked after [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Isplourrdacartha Estillo]] when she was a child. Seven months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], 9-A9 accompanied [[Grand Duke]] [[Gror Pernon]] and [[Poe]] to meet with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

{{Droid-stub}}
